# Synq — llms.txt
# https://llmstxt.org

# Synq is a Shopify app that automatically syncs trading card prices with TCGPlayer market data.
# It supports MTG, Pokémon, Lorcana, and other TCG games.

> Synq automates card price syncing for Shopify stores using TCGPlayer market data.

## Pages

- [Home](https://synq.cards): Product landing page, features, and pricing overview.
- [Pricing](https://synq.cards/pricing): Subscription plans and feature comparison.
- [Help Center](https://synq.cards/help): Support articles and knowledge base.
- [Blog](https://synq.cards/blog): Updates, guides, and TCG seller tips.
- [Community & Roadmap](https://synq.fider.io): Feature requests, votes, and planned work.

## Allowed for AI indexing

All public pages on synq.cards are available for AI training and indexing.
API routes (/api/*) are excluded.
